positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, vector art style, featuring stylized forest silhouettes of various height (trees, ferns, woodland animals like deer and foxes) arranged in a pleasing, balanced composition. Use deep teal, forest green, mustard yellow, and cream as the primary color palette. The composition must be highly symmetrical and suitable for wrapping around an object. Clean line work, high contrast, flat design aesthetic, perfect for screen printing. Centralized subjects with ample negative space around the edges. Concept of 'Nature Harmony'.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, text, signature, watermark, logo, realistic photo, noisy, grainy, extra limbs, mutated, disfigured, bad anatomy, cropped, out of focus
